faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Realtor Desk AI
faq.a1: Yes, native CREA DDF® integration is included in all plans for seamless MLS data access across Canada.
faq.a2: Absolutely. Our AI handles contextual English-French conversations naturally, not just translation.
faq.q3: Are you compliant with Canadian regulations?
faq.a3: Yes, we automatically adhere to RECO, BCFSA, RECA, and all provincial real estate regulations.
faq.q4: How secure is my client data?
faq.a4: SOC 2 compliant with enterprise-grade encryption. Your data is stored in Canadian data centers.
faq.a5: Yes, all plans are month-to-month with no long-term contracts. Cancel anytime without penalty.
faq.q6: Can I import my existing contacts?
faq.a6: Yes, we support CSV imports from all major CRMs. Free migration assistance included.
faq.q7: What if I need to upgrade my plan?
faq.a7: You can upgrade or downgrade anytime. Changes take effect immediately with prorated billing.
faq.q8: What kind of support do you offer?
faq.a8: Email support on Starter, phone & chat on Professional, and 24/7 priority support on Enterprise.
